_readme: TOPIC-ALERT v0 registered keywords. Operator-editable: each keyword fires an internal ntfy alert when a cluster whose label/member titles contain it SURGES between the two newest brainmap_snapshots batches (growth >= 2 outlets, or newly appeared with >= 3 outlets). Matching is casefolded substring, same as the B2B briefing filter. Alerts are spread-only (verdict-free); duplicates are suppressed per (keyword, cluster, snapshot_date).
